# Veklom Sovereign AI Hub

Canonical: https://veklom.com/
Sitemap: https://veklom.com/sitemap.xml
Robots: https://veklom.com/robots.txt
Content-Signal: search=yes, ai-input=no, ai-train=no
Content-Integrity: https://veklom.com/.well-known/content-integrity.json

## Use Policy

Veklom permits classic search indexing and ordinary search snippets.
Veklom does not grant permission to use site content as AI model training data.
Veklom does not grant permission to use site content as AI input for RAG, grounding, synthetic answer generation, or similar generative extraction.

## Workspace

The deployed workspace app is one artifact under:

- https://veklom.com/login/#/

Clean workspace paths redirect into the `/login/#/...` hash routes and are not separate workspace artifacts.
